title: Operations Rail Table Console
concept: A dense operations rail console that treats Playground sessions as table rows with a persistent selected-detail panel, command search, transfer history, and protected live WordPress preview all mutating the same active object.
focus: left operations rail with Create, Save, Library, Manage, Blueprints, Data, Logs, and Transfer modes
admin table plus selected-detail object model
command search discovery with grouped results and executable forms
stateful row transformations for temporary, saving, saved, local permission, deleted, imported, and exported states
protected embedded WordPress shell beside management and transfer controls
flows: Finish command search discovery end to end by querying import zip, selecting the grouped Transfer result, validating a failed and successful archive state, confirming replacement, showing progress, and mutating shell title, path, selected row, preview, and transfer history.
Finish ZIP import end to end with source selection, replacement warning, archive validation, failure state, import progress, success state, and active Playground identity update.

Save the active temporary Playground in this browser with file-copy progress, browser slug consequence, storage badge mutation, selected row transformation, preview result, and reset versus reload behavior.

Save to a local directory as a distinct destination with folder permission grant or denial, file-copy progress, local folder identity, local permission row state, and reconnect-after-refresh consequence.

Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds from an admin table with select, open, rename, delete confirmation, final deleted row state, and active fallback to an unsaved Playground when deleting the active saved object.
Use Site Manager settings, files, Blueprint, database, logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip without hiding the live WordPress shell.

Browse an honestly labeled representative subset of the 43 Blueprint gallery entries with current categories, search, selected detail, Blueprint URL, copy, download, run, validation/result state, and preview mutation.
Run portability actions for GitHub import/export, ZIP import/download, database download, and Blueprint bundle actions with visible transfer history.
featureCoverage: Vanilla WordPress start route
WordPress PR preview route with PR number or URL input
Gutenberg PR or branch route with branch, PR, or URL input
GitHub import with account connection and token-not-stored consequence
Blueprint URL runner with validation and replacement warning
Import .zip with native chooser framing, validation failure, replacement warning, progress, and imported result
Blueprint gallery categories and search with representative subset labeled 8 shown of 43
Featured Blueprint shortcuts including Art Gallery, Coffee Shop, Feed Reader with the Friends Plugin, Gaming News, Non-profit Organization, and Personal Blog
Save temporary Playground in browser storage
Save to a local directory with folder picker, permission denial, permission grant, local identity, and reconnect consequence
Visible save progress with file counts
Saved, local-directory, imported, exported, deleted, and unsaved Playground rows
Open and manage saved Playgrounds
Rename saved Playground
Delete saved Playground with confirmation, final deleted state, and active fallback
Current shell path input and refresh
Homepage and WP Admin shortcuts
Temporary, browser-saved, local-directory, imported, and exported storage states
WordPress version, PHP version, language, older versions, network access, and multisite settings
Destructive reset for temporary Playgrounds and Save and Reload behavior for stored Playgrounds
Site Manager tabs for Settings, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, Export to GitHub, and Download as zip
File browser with create file, create folder, upload, browse files, selected wp-config.php editor, dirty marker, save, and result state
Blueprint editor with JSON, copy link, download bundle, run, validation, replacement, and result state
SQLite-backed database driver, path, size, database download, Adminer, and phpMyAdmin
Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with info, warning, and error states
Export to GitHub with repository target and completion
Download active Playground as .zip with progress and generated archive result
Database download
Blueprint bundle copy, download, and run actions
Transfer history for saves, imports, exports, downloads, file edits, settings, Blueprint runs, rename, delete, refresh, and path navigation
